title: Milk Frothing Pitcher, 350ml/12oz 304 Stainless Steel Coffee Jug with Measurement Marks & Latte Art Pen, Ideal for Crafting Latte Art, Cappuccino, Perfect for Home Baristas & Coffee Enthusiasts
features: 【Premium Food-Grade 304 Stainless Steel 】Crafted from durable, corrosion-resistant 304 stainless steel, this milk frothing pitcher and accompanying latte art pen are entirely food-safe. Built to withstand high temperatures and daily use, ensuring long-lasting performance and safety for you and your family.

【Precision Pouring with Dripless Spout】Features an eagle-beak spout designed for smooth, controlled pouring to create crisp, defined patterns. Perfect for mastering latte art—keep your designs clean and professional without messy drips.

【Ergonomic & User-Friendly Design】A wide, sturdy handle offers a comfortable, non-slip grip that reduces hand fatigue. Clear internal measurement markings allow accurate milk portioning, making it easy to achieve consistent results for lattes, cappuccinos, and other beverages.

【Effortless Cleaning & Dishwasher Safe】The smooth stainless steel surface resists residue build-up and is safe to clean in the dishwasher. Hassle-free maintenance helps preserve the pitcher’s sleek look and extends its lifespan—great for daily use or as a thoughtful gift.
【100% Satisfied After-Sales Service】24-month stress-free warranty, and Amazon's friendly customer service.
